The Press thinks it knows why the amendment granting

So Washington have given their sisters the chance

ably their first opportunity will be at the special election
the adoption of the commission form of charter and
then the spring city election There hundreds of
en- in this city who do not to vote now who do not
think it is woman's province to mix in politics. The
future of women in politics will depend wholly upon the
intelligence of the present enthusiasts and workers.


AS for The Press it is glad they have been given the
chance and it hopes and expects that they will win
Here's the best of luck to the voters of the state
